top_stories.title: Microsoft Releases Phi-4-Reasoning-Vision-15B: A Compact Multimodal Model for Math, Science, and GUI Understanding
top_stories.description: Microsoft has released Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B, a 15 billion parameter open-weight multimodal reasoning model designed for image and text tasks that require both perception and selective reasoning. It is a compact model built to balance reasoning quality, compute efficiency, and training-data requirements, with particular strength in scientific and mathematical reasoning and understanding user interfaces. What the model […] The post Microsoft Releases Phi-4-Reasoning-Vision-15B: A Compact...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: Microsoft has released Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B, a 15 billion parameter open-weight multimodal reasoning model designed for image and text tasks that require both perception and selective reasoning. top_stories.title: From Radiology to Drug Discovery, Survey Reveals AI Is Delivering Clear Return on Investment in Healthcare
top_stories.description: AI is accelerating every aspect of healthcare — from radiology and drug discovery to medical device manufacturing and new treatment methods enabled by digital twins of the human body. NVIDIA’s second annual “State of AI in Healthcare and Life Sciences” survey report reveals how the industry is moving from AI experimentation to execution, reaping return […]

top_stories.content: AI is accelerating every aspect of healthcare — from radiology and drug discovery to medical device manufacturing and new treatment methods enabled by digital twins of the human body. top_stories.title: NVIDIA and Partners Show That Software-Defined AI-RAN Is the Next Wireless Generation
top_stories.description: AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN […]

top_stories.title: Intelligence isn’t about parameter count. It’s about time.
top_stories.description: As AI models grow larger, they become less insightful, not more. To ensure that they continue to learn, we need to reduce their inference time.
top_stories.author: Stefano Soatto
top_stories.content: As AI models grow larger, they become less insightful, not more. To ensure that they continue to learn, we need to reduce their inference time.

top_stories.title: Drive organizational growth with Amazon Lex multi-developer CI/CD pipeline
top_stories.description: In this post, we walk through a multi-developer CI/CD pipeline for Amazon Lex that enables isolated development environments, automated testing, and streamlined deployments. We show you how to set up the solution and share real-world results from teams using this approach.
top_stories.author: Grazia Russo Lassner
top_stories.content: In this post, we walk through a multi-developer CI/CD pipeline for Amazon Lex that enables isolated development environments, automated testing, and streamlined deployments. We show you how to set up the solution and share real-world results from teams using this approach.
